title: Columns for opening folders and launching apps
excerpt: I would like a column (or modify the FILES type column) that allows you to place a link to open a FOLDER on the local drive.  Also the ability to place a link to an APPLICATION in a column so that an app or AppleScript c…

posts.author: CASA (Steve Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like a column (or modify the FILES type column) that allows you to place a link to open a FOLDER on the local drive. Also the ability to place a link to an APPLICATION in a column so that an app or AppleScript can be launched within Monday.com. I know this would only really work for local use only, but a lot of what I do is local drive based that other remote team members just view but don’t interact with much.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Steve!

Thanks for your feature request.

Can you please let us know if your initial request aligns with the existing feature request here → Link-Column with a Local Link (not Web-Link)? I ask as we can then merge the 2 requests to consolidate votes and put greater emphasis on this need.

If this is the case, are you happy to post a seperate feature request for specific to linking to an application?

posts.author: lashi (Lashi Bandara)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve built a monday.com app called Local and web links, specifically for this. You can open local files and folders directly without leaving monday.com.
It’s currently in beta, and you’re welcome to try it.

It will be available in the marketplace soon. We designed it to be very affordable , and its simple nature allows us to offer it at a low price for every monday.com user.

viskode.com

Local and Web Links

posts.author: lashi (Lashi Bandara)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi our app is live now.
Local & Web Links

You can give the app a try with the free plan, it covers up to 5 users.
